content:
Two weekends ago we had an incredible turnout for the ESC open, with 89 players participating making us officially oversubscribed! Next year we might have to consider starting on Thursday for Local players to accommodate everyone.

Thank you to Jeff for organizing such a great tournament, Anne for making sure everything was set to go and Sandra, Gavin and Chelsea for keeping the logistics running smoothly.

Congratulations to all of our winners:

Open: John Clarkin

A: Brad Salter

B: Sameir Deif

C: Aaron Yaremchuk

D: Greg Dawe

E: Brian McFarlane

Women’s B: Sue McCoy

Women’s D:  Tamara Auriat

Women’s E: Ena Nicholson

A special thank you also to the group that came down from Grand Prairie. You guys rock!
